aljazeera.title: US expands military strikes on Iran after Trump says he’ll ‘hit them hard’
Deadly strikes in Gaza leave 5 dead, children wounded

monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Conducts Missile and Drone Attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain
— S4 · Conflict · Kuwait · 2h ago. Iran launches missile and drone strikes on Kuwait and Bahrain, with short-range ballistic missiles fired from Bushehr. Casualties and damage unknown.
US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles and Drones at Kuwait and Bahrain; Air Defenses Intercept Most Projectiles
Iran Strikes US Fifth Fleet Base in Bahrain With Ballistic Missiles and Drones, Sirens Sound Across Multiple Gulf States

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 1d ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
